name: Vehicle Tracking & Fleet Management System
description: Developed a scalable Vehicle Tracking and Fleet Management platform for real-time monitoring of fleet operations. The system processes continuous GPS telemetry from vehicle devices and provides live location updates, trip history, route playback, and alerts for events like overspeeding, ignition status changes, and geofence violations. Built using a microservices architecture with NestJS and Node.js, it delivers real-time updates via WebSockets and stores high-frequency tracking data efficiently using PostgreSQL.
impact: Built a real-time vehicle tracking and fleet management platform enabling live location monitoring, trip history analysis, and operational control using WebSockets and a microservices architecture. Improved fleet visibility and decision-making by providing instant tracking updates and scalable backend services capable of handling high-frequency location data streams.
architecture: Designed using a microservices architecture to handle high-frequency real-time location updates. The system consists of independent services for tracking, user management, and analytics, communicating via REST and message queues. Real-time communication is powered by WebSockets to stream live vehicle data to clients. PostgreSQL is used for persistent storage, while caching mechanisms optimize frequent reads. The system is horizontally scalable to support large fleets and concurrent users.

name: CMS For Vehicle and Fleet Management
description: Developed a scalable Content Management System (CMS) that enables organizations to efficiently manage website content, pages, and media through a centralized dashboard. The platform provides role-based access control, dynamic page management, and API-driven content delivery for frontend applications. Built using NestJS and Node.js, the system exposes secure REST APIs and uses PostgreSQL for reliable data storage, ensuring performance, flexibility, and easy content management across multiple pages and sections.
impact: Developed a centralized content and operations management system to control fleet data, driver records, routes, and configurations. Streamlined administrative workflows and reduced manual overhead by enabling dynamic control over system entities through a structured and role-based interface.
architecture: Built on a modular Microservice architecture with clearly separated domains such as vehicles, drivers, routes, and permissions. Implemented RESTful APIs using NestJS with role-based access control (RBAC) for secure operations. PostgreSQL is used for relational data management, ensuring consistency across entities. The frontend communicates via API layer, enabling centralized control.

name: Building Contracting & Project Management System
description: System to manage construction projects, contractors, and resources. Covers project planning, progress tracking, contractor/subcontractor management, budget and expense tracking, material inventory, procurement, and document management.
impact: Designed and implemented a real-time telesales automation platform integrating WhatsApp Business API with WebSockets to enable instant communication, lead tracking, and agent coordination. Increased sales team productivity by automating outreach workflows, reducing response time, and enabling scalable real-time messaging infrastructure.
architecture: Structured using a layered architecture separating business logic, data access, and presentation layers. The backend exposes REST APIs for managing projects, tasks, and resources, while the frontend consumes these services for real-time updates. Data is stored in PostgreSQL with relational mapping for project hierarchies. Designed for extensibility to support additional modules like billing, reporting, and notifications.

name: Telesales Automation Platform with WhatsApp Business API & WebSockets
description:
Designed and developed a scalable, real-time telesales automation platform leveraging WhatsApp Business APIs and WebSocket-based communication to streamline customer engagement and sales workflows. The system enables agents to manage high-volume conversations, automate follow-ups, and track leads efficiently within a unified interface.

Architected a microservices-driven backend (using NestJS) to handle messaging queues, session management, and API integrations, ensuring high availability and fault tolerance. Implemented real-time bidirectional communication using WebSockets to provide instant message delivery, typing indicators, and live status updates for agents.

Integrated WhatsApp Business API for sending templated messages, handling inbound/outbound communication, and managing webhook events securely. Built intelligent lead distribution and tracking mechanisms, allowing teams to monitor conversion pipelines and agent performance in real time.

Optimized system performance with asynchronous processing, caching strategies, and event-driven design patterns, enabling the platform to handle concurrent users and large-scale messaging operations.
impact: Designed and implemented a real-time telesales automation platform integrating WhatsApp Business API with WebSockets to enable instant communication, lead tracking, and agent coordination. Increased sales team productivity by automating outreach workflows, reducing response time, and enabling scalable real-time messaging infrastructure.
architecture: Implemented using a microservices-based, event-driven architecture to support real-time communication and high concurrency. Integrated WhatsApp Business API for messaging, with WebSockets enabling instant updates between agents and system. Services handle lead management, messaging, and analytics independently, communicating via queues/events. Redis is used for session and real-time state management, ensuring low latency and scalability under heavy load.
